name: View Logs shows empty state when no logs exist

payload.text:
📋 No action logs yet.

Instructions you execute will appear here.

name: View Logs shows logs after instructions are executed

payload.text:
Available instructions:
• status — system status
• broadcast <text> — send message to all users
• set owner <id> — change owner
• set retention <days> — set log retention
• help — show this list
